heroHeadline: Ukraine Strikes Russia's Baltic Oil Ports; 40% of Russian Export Capacity Halted
heroSubtitle: Russia's spring 2026 offensive confirmed underway targeting Fortress Belt; Trump claims peace deal 'close' but Zelenskyy reports no real progress; 168 combat engagements Mar 24
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OHCHR, ISW, CSIS, Ukrainian MoD, US DoD, NATO, IAEA, and major news outlets including Reuters, BBC, AP, NYT, Bloomberg, and Kyiv Independent. Casualty figures are estimates; Russia has never released official figures.
